name: Number C102: Archfiend Seraph
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０２ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光堕天使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンホーリー・ライトニング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ノーブル・デーモン
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Hyakuni Anhōrī Raitoningu Nōburu Dēmon
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 102: Unholy Lightning Noble Daemon
desc:
4 Level 5 LIGHT monsters
If this face-up card would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can detach 2 materials from this card instead. If the last material(s) is detached from this card: Inflict 1500 damage to your opponent. If this card has "Number 102: Star Seraph Sentry" as material, it gains this effect.
● Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change that target's ATK to 0, and if you do, negate its effects.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials for effect
Activates if Xyz Material is detached
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
